title: Broken internal link on Google sheets
author: Troy96
body:
Hi,  I tried to add an internal link following the docs of exceljs but seems it is not working. Am I missing something here? Please help. 
![Screenshot 2021-04-20 at 10 54 56 AM](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/24861825/115349923-0f7d3500-a1d2-11eb-8a81-7dc682f74803.png)
![Screenshot 2021-04-20 at 10 57 54 AM](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/24861825/115349932-12782580-a1d2-11eb-92b3-8eacb3d60342.png)

comments.author: skypesky
comments.body:
@Troy96 hi,Troy96
I can't fully understand the problems you encounter. Only by letting others understand the problems, can the problems be solved! Maybe you need to:
1. Provide complete test cases
2. Provide an excel file with correct format

comments.author: skypesky
comments.body: @Troy96 This problem has been fixed and can be used only with the release version.

comments.author: maybebane
comments.body: > The fix is still buggy in wps office

comments.author: Champjiwrd
comments.body: its still bug on Sep, 2023 (its work on excel but not work in Google Sheets
